channel.title: Tech Blog
channel.description: Cutting-edge insights into technology, AI, and development

item.title: How we cut API cost 60% with rate limiting that survived Black Friday
item.description: Cut API cost by 63% and 429s to zero with a hybrid sliding-window plus token-bucket rate limiter that handled 5M req/min and kept p95 latency under 200 ms during Black Friday. Includes Go code, Redis Streams setup, and staging checklist.

item.title: React vs Next.js vs Remix: Choosing the Right Tool: A Practical Technical Guide
item.description: Cut React vs Next.js vs Remix: Choosing the Right Tool failures by understanding connection pooling and retry logic — real benchmarks, common mistakes, …

item.title: How Rwanda, Vietnam and Estonia built AI infra faster than California
item.description: Cut AI serving costs by 90% with Rwanda’s RPi + T4 stack — 4 ms edge latency, 220 ms mid-tier, and the real ISP egress tricks nobody mentions. Build it in a day.

item.title: The 9 cheapest ways to deploy a web app in 2026
item.description: Launch a production web app for $3.50/month with Hetzner CX11, SQLite, and Nginx—measure real latency, CPU throttling, and idle costs for 2026 deployments.

item.title: Go concurrency in 30 minutes: 100K goroutines under 2s
item.description: l fell by 38% because we could now run 10× with concurrency minutes 100K goroutines — cut the 47-second average response time to under 5.

item.title: Queries timing out after 30 seconds? Your indexes are hiding in plain sight
item.description: Cut query latency from 30 seconds to under 200ms by fixing hidden index mismatches — refresh statistics, tune random_page_cost, and stop expression-based predicates from breaking index usage. Real benchmarks and fixes from a fintech SRE’s war room.

item.title: SOLID vs Anti-Patterns in Real Projects
item.description: Cut incident recovery time from 4 hours to 30 seconds with SOLID in real projects while keeping anti-patterns 30% faster to ship. Practical guide to when SOLID works and when to ship messy code.

item.title: WhatsApp’s chat system finally explained
item.description: Cut end-to-end chat latency to 250 ms and $0.0000015 per message with WebSocket edges, Kafka queues, and Signal encryption — the same stack WhatsApp uses.

item.title: Spark jobs in 5 minutes: no YARN, no HDFS, just 200ms latency
item.description: ly steals 10% of your driver memory before with Spark jobs minutes YARN — the driver, but the logs showed nothing useful.

item.title: Time series forecasting with AI is overrated — here’s what works instead
item.description: Reduce AI time series forecasting costs by 80% with classical models — Prophet, seasonal naive, and XGBoost outperform deep learning in 80% of cases, with MAE improvements up to 15% when operational constraints are considered.

item.title: Automate 10 enterprise workflows in 3 hours with Python RPA
item.description: ll shared 70% of its data via email attachm with Automate enterprise workflows hours — one master sheet.

item.title: 13 Bash tricks every non-terminal developer needs to ship faster
item.description: ilds were 30% slower than local builds on m with Bash tricks non-terminal needs — solve) I spent two years avoiding the terminal.

item.title: Micro-Frontends at 500ms to 50ms in 30 Days Without Rewriting Everything
item.description: Cut user-perceived latency from 1.2s to 500ms with micro-frontends — deployment scripts, CDN edge setup, and the regional gotchas that break the docs’ promises.

item.title: The 7 Best Tools for Building a Frustration-Free Dev Environment
item.description: Build a development environment under 30 minutes with the 7 best tools for coding, debugging, and collaboration — cut setup time and reduce frustration.

item.title: What happens when Python, Go, and Rust meet Nigeria’s 3G networks
item.description: tlined at 100% on one core while the others with happens Python Rust meet — Celery with Redis.

item.title: The 9 best Explainable AI tools to lift the lid on black boxes
item.description: Cut API latency by 60% and reduce auditor questions to zero with SHAP TreeExplainer — open-source, exact attributions, and real numbers from Indonesian e-commerce and Vietnamese fintech deployments.

item.title: Why your cloud credentials keep leaking (and how to stop it)
item.description: Reduce cloud bill spikes by 92% by replacing long-lived AWS keys with OIDC federation and IAM roles — connection pooling, eviction policies, and the mistakes that cause credential leakage.

item.title: When AI predicts your friendships before you do
item.description: 0ms. That 79% drop in latency changed how u with AI predicts friendships you — rebuild the graph after every batch of new enrollme.

item.title: Claude 3 Opus cut our dev cost by 37% vs ChatGPT
item.description: Cut blended dev cost by 37% and human review time by 89% by switching from GPT-4 to Claude 3 Opus for strict JSON generation — real latency, token, and cost numbers from a live SaaS pipeline.

item.title: The 9 data systems Netflix uses to pick what to build next
item.description: Cut feature churn by 60% with Netflix’s 9 data systems — A/B experiments, CLV models, graph affinity, and the exact tools, versions, and costs for bootstrappers to series B startups
